emails.body:
Hi James,

I noticed you're leading some impressive initiatives at JIATF. We help senior officers like you amplify their professional brand on LinkedIn — typically 3-5x more profile views and inbound opportunities within 90 days.

Our done-for-you service includes:
• Profile optimization for your target audience
• Weekly thought-leadership posts ghostwritten in your voice
• Strategic network growth with decision-makers in your space

Worth a 10-min call this week?

Best,
Sarah Chen
Growth Strategist | Executive Presence Partners
sarah.chen@offers.example

---
Unsubscribe: offers.example/unsub/SPAM-001

Following up — figured you're heads-down with the Senate briefing prep.

No pressure. Just wanted to share a quick case study: helped a CAPT at PACFLT land a fellowship and two board seats in 6 months using the same system.

If timing's better after the 6th, happy to circle back then.

Sarah

---
Original message sent 2026-10-04 21:56 EDT
